headline: Costco Expands Beauty Offering With Exclusive Aussie Miracle Curls Launch
summary: Costco Wholesale (NasdaqGS:COST) has launched an exclusive Aussie's Miracle Curls Extra Moisture Jumbo Dual Pack in its clubs. The new jumbo, club-only format targets members with wavy, curly, and coily hair who are seeking specialized, higher-end haircare in larger sizes. This is Aussie's debut at Costco, expanding the retailer's health and beauty offering with a focus on textured hair needs. For Costco, which is best known for bulk groceries and household staples, health and beauty has...
